ab: Miholol kako aci ina^ no mako.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: Salangdaw sa ko kakarayan; caay ka sienaw, caay ka faedet; sasaepi’ sa ko fali^.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: I semosemotan kako a komaen to man-to^, mapacidal ko tatirengan, sadiheko^ saan.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

ab: I herek no lahok, sakahengang sato ko kakarayan.
en: In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: Milicay kako i ci ina^, "Enaw kahengan ko kakarayan?" han ako.
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: Sowal sa ci ina^, "Alatek ira ko faliyos." saan.
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: Awaay ko cahid i dadaya^, masadakay ko fo’is.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: I fatad no lalan to sakataloma’, mitolon kako pasyra i fo’is.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: Na:nay caay ka tayni ko faliyos, nawhani mangalay ho^ kako a miholol.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
